name: Pier 70
summary_en: Archive documents trace planning for Pier 70, described as a roughly 65- to 69-acre historic shipyard, including a 1986 container terminal options study and San Francisco Port Commission agendas and minutes on a preferred master plan, a proposed Pier 70 Special Use District, a Forest City waterfront term sheet, a Historic Buildings clean-up, and a Union Iron Works historic district to support rehabilitation. The pier is operated by the Port of San Francisco, whose FY2025 budget line is $156M; no place-specific city contract appears in this data.
